topic: Fertility and wealth in Africa's highest-birth countries
geography: 15 countries accounting for 72.85% of Africa's projected 2026 births
source_note: DHS Program total fertility rate indicator FE_FRTR_W_TFR with breakdown=all, plus Our World in Data births and continent mapping based on UN WPP 2024.

clearest_pattern_breaks.note: Middle wealth quintile has higher fertility than the two poorer quintiles.
Bottom four wealth quintiles are nearly flat before fertility falls in the richest quintile.

named_data_gap.note: Latest DHS is 1989-90, too old for current household-level socioeconomic comparison.
